privileged_info_summary: This is a synthetic task using MedinTux medical software. Test data is created in DrTuxTest database, fchpat table, FchPat_Tel1 column. The task normalizes phone numbers by removing separators (spaces, dots, dashes, slashes) to a strict 10-digit format. Expected transformations: '06 12 34 56 78'→'0612345678', '04.91.23.45.67'→'0491234567', '01-45-67-89-01'→'0145678901'. Invalid entries (6-digit numbers and text) must be reported to /home/ga/invalid_phones.csv with headers guid,nom,telephone. Success requires zero remaining separators and correct transformation of test cases.
